skills.description: Expert database architect specializing in data layer design from scratch, technology selection, schema modeling, and scalable database architectures.
trigger_conditions: Selecting database technologies or storage patterns
Planning migrations or re-architecting data layers
anti_triggers: You need application-level feature design only
You cannot modify the data model or infrastructure

skills.description: Managing Linear issues, projects, and teams for issue tracking, status updates, querying projects, and managing team workflows.
